name: TypiCore: A Hybrid Active Query Strategy for Class-Incremental Learning on Time Series

description: arXiv:2607.17632v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Time series data play a pivotal role across numerous domains, including healthcare and manufacturing. In real-world environments, models must cope with distribution shifts over time, a challenge commonly addressed through Continual Learning (CL) techniques. However, existing CL methods face a critical limitation: real-world data streams are rare...
author: Gabor Szucs, Samuel Jacsev, Marcell Nemeth, Davide Dalle Pezze, Gian Antonio Susto
